variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 12528 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 12528 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 12528 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P172433 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12528
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P172433 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.
